changes: Phase 2 — Component substrate: pinned SHAs for all 7 libraries (cult-ui MIT, aceternity Proprietary-EndProduct, skiper-ui MIT, watermelon MIT, styleui MIT, componentry MIT w/ GSAP caveat, dotmatrix Proprietary-EndProduct). License audit gates passed for watermelon + styleui. Recipe table resolved against live registries — every component name verified against actual library catalogs (substitutions documented in per-section notes).
Phase 2 — scripts/install-registry-deps.mjs: niche-aware shadcn-registry installer with idempotency tracking, --dry-run mode, streaming pnpm output.
Phase 2 — registry/LICENSES.md: full license audit doc with per-library terms + Phase 2 exit-gate verdicts.
Phase 2 — recipes/README.md: lexicographic conflict resolution table (aceternity < componentry < cult-ui < dotmatrix < skiper-ui < styleui < watermelon).

Phase 3 — Design taste layer: 8 reference seeds filled with curated tokens (Stripe purple gradient, Apple SF Pro + true black, ElevenLabs cyan/violet glow, Resend cream+Geist mono, Linear violet dark canvas, Sweetgreen earth+vegetal, Blue Bottle navy+cream, Eleven Madison Park emerald+serif). 7+ colors / 2+ fonts / 4+ spacing+radii / 4+ anti-patterns each.
Phase 3 — tokens/tokens.schema.json: JSON Schema draft-07 with key-pattern enforcement on --color-<adj>-<noun> + --font-(display|body|mono|accent)-<name>.
Phase 3 — scripts/extract-tokens.mjs: Playwright extractor with HSL→adjective-noun heuristic. Lazy-imports playwright; graceful fail w/ install instructions if missing.
Phase 3 — tokens/README.md: token naming dictionary appended (color buckets, hue map, typography slots, spacing+radii pool, 4 cross-seed rules).

Phase 4 — Niche reasoning: 9 niches filled w/ concrete decision-rules (do/never/typography mood/key effect/copy patterns/CTA patterns/anti-patterns/A2P variants/token affinity). Bronx Havana Room + Five Bucks (lounge), Bronx Havana Cafe (restaurant-bar), Travelin Tom's (mobile-food-truck), Appliance Plug (appliance-retail), FGA self (agency-b2b), plus med-spa-aesthetic, plumber-hvac, auto-detail-mobile, barber-salon.
Phase 4 — _PROMOTE.md: one-off rule promotion path doc (operator marks rule → monthly review → bar=worked-on-≥2-sites → demotion path if it stops working).
Token-budget check: every niche file ~1,265-1,505 tokens — half-budget headroom for future promotions.
Naming + paths corrected: aceternity (not 'acternity'), skiper-ui /registry/ (not /r/), watermelon registry.watermelon.sh (not ui.watermelon.sh/r), cult-ui www-prefix (not apex).
Initial scaffold — skill.json, SKILL.md, activation triggers
Directory structure for all 3 substrates (registry/, tokens/, reasoning/)
Seed FGA-canonical token set (jet-anchor, paper-base, electric-canary, etc.)
9 niche reasoning rule stubs (content fleshed in Phase 4)
8 reference style seed stubs (content extracted in Phase 3)
Release pipeline with JSON schema validation
